title: Avaritia's Delight
description: Add avaritia style food base on farmer's delight.
body:
# Avaritia's Delight This is an addon of [Re:Avaritia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/re-avaritia) and [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight), add various food and drinks.
This mod is still under development. Some items may not have recipes and effects. ## FAQ ### What dependencies do I need? Re: Avaritia, Farmer's Delight and Architectury API ### Will there be a Fabric version? Ofc, the Fabric version is ready and wait for update of Re:Avaritia Fabric. ### Meet bugs or suggestions? Talk with us on GitHub!
